member.name: T:DepenMock.Moq.MoqExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for working with Moq-backed instances.

member.name: M:DepenMock.Moq.MoqExtensions.AsMoq``1(DepenMock.Mocks.IMock{``0})
member.summary: Unwraps the underlying Moq from an , giving access to Moq's Setup and Verify APIs.

member.name: T:DepenMock.Moq.MoqMock`1
member.summary: An implementation backed by a Moq . Access the underlying property (or call ) to use Moq's Setup and Verify APIs.
member.typeparam: The type being mocked. Must be a reference type.

member.name: M:DepenMock.Moq.MoqMock`1.#ctor(Moq.Mock{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of wrapping the given Moq mock.

member.name: P:DepenMock.Moq.MoqMock`1.Mock
member.summary: Gets the underlying Moq , providing access to Setup, Verify, and all other Moq-specific APIs.

member.name: T:DepenMock.Moq.MoqMockFactory
member.summary: An implementation that uses Moq and AutoFixture.AutoMoq to automatically create and register mocks for unregistered dependencies.

member.name: M:DepenMock.Moq.MoqMockFactory.GetCustomization
member.remarks: Returns an with ConfigureMembers = true, which instructs AutoFixture to automatically stub all members of auto-created mocks.

member.name: M:DepenMock.Moq.MoqMockFactory.GetMock``1(AutoFixture.IFixture)
member.remarks: Freezes a in the fixture so the same instance is reused whenever is resolved, then wraps it in a .
